title: oriastrum minutum
intro: Oriastrum minutum, also known as the minute oriastrum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Oriastrum minutum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
